overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring an industrial settlement. The video begins with a hazy overlook from a rocky cliff, then transitions to ground level where the character walks through metal walkways, open plazas, and narrow corridors of a futuristic industrial town.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook of industrial settlement

agents.ego_description: standing on rocky outcrop surveying the industrial settlement in the valley below

entered.detail: reddish rocky outcrop where character stands
sprawling industrial complex with metal structures and towers in the hazy distance
tall rock formations visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a reddish rocky cliff overlooking a vast industrial settlement shrouded in haze. The camera pans slightly across the vista showing metal structures and distant rock formations under a hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial entry walkway with overhead gantries

character walks beneath large metal gantry structure

entered.detail: large metal truss structure spanning overhead
large cylindrical storage tanks with piping
metal staircase with railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to ground level where the character walks through an industrial entry corridor. Large metal gantries span overhead while cylindrical tanks and a bright green kiosk mark the sides of the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial plaza with scattered settlers

events.description: passing other pedestrians in the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza between industrial buildings passing other settlers

entered.detail: tall industrial structures with metal facades and piping
large industrial pipes running along building exterior

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open industrial plaza with scattered pedestrians walking about. Industrial buildings line both sides with overhead walkways spanning between them, while the character passes settlers going about their business.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with stair descent

events.description: character turns right and begins descending metal stairs
moving into shadowed area between tall industrial structures

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking down stairs into a lower industrial corridor

notable_agents.action: worker in white lab coat standing near equipment

large vertical and horizontal piping systems
yellow industrial equipment visible in the lower area

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and descends metal stairs into a narrower, more enclosed industrial corridor. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as they move between tall structures, passing a worker in a white coat.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level walkway with seating area

events.description: entering covered seating area with distinctive yellow furniture

agents.ego_description: walking through lower level past yellow seating area toward a ramp

entered.detail: distinctive yellow chairs arranged in seating area
metal ramp leading upward at end of corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered lower-level walkway featuring a seating area with distinctive yellow chairs and tables. The corridor is dimly lit with artificial lighting as the character approaches a metal ramp at the end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a hazy, elevated vista of a sci-fi settlement down into the shadowed depths of its industrial corridors. It begins on a reddish rocky cliff overlooking a vast expanse of metal structures shrouded in haze before shifting to ground level, where the camera follows the character through an entry corridor lined with cylindrical tanks and a bright green kiosk. As the character emerges from this passage, the scene opens into a bustling industrial plaza filled with pedestrians and overhead walkways. The camera then turns right and descends metal stairs, causing the environment to contract into a narrower, darker corridor where the lighting becomes more shadowed. Finally, the movement leads through a dimly lit lower-level walkway featuring yellow chairs and tables before approaching a metal ramp.
